name: Seafood Cocktail Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the tomato juice, horseradish, Worchestershire sauce, vinegar, and lemon juice.
2. Stir in the chopped parsley until well combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and chill thoroughly before serving.
4. This sauce is perfect for all types of seafood and makes about 1/2 cup. It contains approximately 20 calories per serving.
